events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: the unstaggered gypsum board end joints fail GA-216 (which requires joint offset, typically one framing member/16" o.c., to avoid a continuous line of weakness), risk is medium given potential impact on cracking and any fire/sound-rated assembly listing, and the required corrective action is to remove and reposition panels before taping proceeds.
